summary:
Agent2 reasoned that while most other items have specific roles within tattoo procedures such as providing colors or ensuring longevity, prussian blue serves medical purposes unrelated to tattoos making it unique amongst them. The conclusion was reached by identifying how each item fits into traditional tattoo practice versus non-tattoo contexts with particular emphasis placed upon prussians' medicinal role over decorative one. \boxed{Prussian Blue}

The summary captures the essence of why prussian blue differs fundamentally based on its intended usage outside typical tattoo materials without repeating unnecessary details already covered effectively earlier. It highlights both functional aspects alongside contextual relevance succinctly yet comprehensively addressing what sets this option apart clearly enough even if less explicitly stated previously. 

Key Points Summarized:
1) Identification & description distinguishing factors between potential candidates
2) Contextual significance highlighting differences beyond mere presence/absence 
3) Conclusion emphasizing uniqueness via contrasting functions/practices
